who: billing coordinators in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For billing coordinators in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent billing denials cause cash flow gaps. We trigger follow-up alerts instead of manual tracking of billing denials and follow-ups.
problem: Frequent billing denials leading to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to billing coordinators with demo video
Share insights in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try alert system for billing denials on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
